home.description: Create topics, share them with the group, and each player fills in answers on their own phone.

rules.topics: Choose or create the topics for the round.
rules.share: Share the topics by QR Code or code.
rules.answer: Draw a letter and each player writes on their own phone.

home.tip: mix classic categories with weird prompts like "My boss is..." and "Terrible excuse". The round gets much livelier.

setup.title: Prepare Categories
setup.heroDescription: Use classic topics, add different categories, or import a list someone shared.
setup.importDescription: Scan the group's QR or paste the shared code.
setup.sharedCodePlaceholder: Paste the code or QR Code link
setup.duplicateOrLimitError: This topic is already on the list or the 16-topic limit was reached.
setup.invalidCodeError: I could not read this code. Check that it was copied completely.
setup.shareModalDescription: Show the QR to the group or send the code. Anyone who imports it gets the created topics and the round letter.

scanner.title: Scan QR
scanner.description: Point the camera at the topics QR Code. Import happens automatically.
scanner.cameraError: I could not open the camera. Check the app permission and try again.

play.chooseLetterDescription: The group can agree on a letter or draw one. When everyone has the same letter, start the round.
play.scoringDescription: Mark 10 for a unique answer, 5 if someone repeated the same answer, or 0 for blank/invalid.
play.shareModalDescription: Show the QR to another player or send the code. It imports only the topics and letter, not your answers.

fun: Place not to take a crush
Thing that seems rich but is cheap
